name: Kentbruck Green Power Hub
operational_notes: Ownership chain: Neoen won CIS T1 award Dec 2024. Neoen sold entire VIC portfolio to HMC Capital 1 Aug 2025 (A$950m — Kentbruck included). HMC/KKR partnership (A$603m) received FIRB/ACCC clearance and reached financial close ~30 Jun 2026 — platform rebranded Illuma Energy consolidating StorEnergy + former Neoen VIC assets. Vic ministerial planning approval late-2025 (reduced turbine count). Pre-FID at ~19 months post-award; capital-partner constraint now resolved but no public FID.

ownership_history.note: Held during CIS T1 award (11 Dec 2024)
Acquired 1 Aug 2025 as part of Neoen VIC portfolio sale (A$950m)
KKR A$603m partnership; FC ~30 Jun 2026; platform rebranded Illuma Energy

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Pre-FID at 19 months post-award. Capital-partner constraint resolved via HMC Capital / KKR (Illuma Energy) FC ~30 Jun 2026, but no public FID confirmation. Vic ministerial planning approval late-2025 required turbine-count reduction. Most publicly-stalled T1 wind winner per RE 30 Mar 2026 'Zero for 15' framing.
